requirements.task_name: Register two children for an affordable July summer Bible camp morning session
requirements.task_description: Find a summer Bible camp in July 2025 for ages 7–10 that costs under $200 per child, and complete registration for two children (ages 7 and 10) in a morning session using a pay-at-check-in option.

requirements.task_name: Set up a $35 monthly donation for Children's Bible Story Kits
requirements.task_description: Create a recurring monthly pledge of $35 designated to the "Children's Bible Story Kits" fund, including a dedication in honor of "Grandma Mary" and choosing a non–online payment option.

requirements.task_name: Save three Easter crafts for ages 6–8 that take under 30 minutes into a collection
requirements.task_description: Find craft activities for ages 6–8 related to Easter, limited to activities that take 30 minutes or less, save the first three results, and group them into a new collection called "Easter 6–8 Crafts".

requirements.task_name: Add two Fruit of the Spirit curriculum sets under $25 for different age groups to the cart
requirements.task_description: Purchase one "Fruit of the Spirit" curriculum set for ages 3–5 and one for ages 9–11, each priced under $25, by filtering, sorting by highest rating, and adding the top-rated qualifying item for each age group to the cart.

requirements.task_name: Apply for an in-person Sunday morning children’s volunteer role within 10 miles of ZIP 30309
requirements.task_description: Find an in-person volunteer opportunity that involves working directly with children on Sunday mornings at a location within 10 miles of ZIP code 30309, and submit a volunteer application for that specific role.

requirements.task_name: Create a four-week April 2025 parables lesson series for ages 5–7
requirements.task_description: Plan four distinct lesson plans about Jesus’ parables for ages 5–7, assign them to a new series titled "April 2025 Parables (Ages 5–7)", and arrange them into a four-week order for the four Sundays in April 2025.

requirements.task_name: Subscribe to a weekly parent newsletter focused on family devotions for ages 8–10
requirements.task_description: Sign up for the parent newsletter using an email address, selecting weekly frequency and topics related to family devotions and prayer for children ages 8–10.

requirements.task_name: Sponsor a child aged 6–9 with a $30–$40 monthly pledge focused on reading and Bible stories
requirements.task_description: Find a child sponsorship profile for a child aged 6–9 who is interested in reading and Bible stories, with a monthly sponsorship amount between $30 and $40, and complete the sponsorship setup using a bill-by-mail payment option.
